'''sachacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:saad|saad]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ch-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:saad|saad]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sachacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæchæchæth|sæchæchæth]] || [[word:sæchæchæj|sæchæchæj]] || [[word:sæchæchæsh|sæchæchæsh]] || [[word:sæchæchæ|sæchæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sachachachath|sachachachath]] || [[word:sachachachaj|sachachachaj]] || [[word:sachachachash|sachachachash]] || [[word:sachachacha|sachachacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sachachath|sachachath]] || [[word:sachachaj|sachachaj]] || [[word:sachachash|sachachash]] || [[word:sachacha|sachacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sachafchath|sachafchath]] || [[word:sachafchaj|sachafchaj]] || [[word:sachafchash|sachafchash]] || [[word:sachafchaf|sachafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sachachatha|sachachatha]] || [[word:sachachaja|sachachaja]] || [[word:sachachasha|sachachasha]] || [[word:sachachaka|sachachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sachachath|sachachath]] || [[word:sachachaj|sachachaj]] || [[word:sachachash|sachachash]] || [[word:sachacha|sachacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sachachathal|sachachathal]] || [[word:sachachajal|sachachajal]] || [[word:sachachashal|sachachashal]] || [[word:sachachakal|sachachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sachachathatha|sachachathatha]] || [[word:sachachajaja|sachachajaja]] || [[word:sachachashasha|sachachashasha]] || [[word:sachachaka|sachachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sachachathan|sachachathan]] || [[word:sachachajan|sachachajan]] || [[word:sachachashan|sachachashan]] || [[word:sachachakan|sachachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sachachathaoro|sachachathaoro]] || [[word:sachachajaoro|sachachajaoro]] || [[word:sachachashaoro|sachachashaoro]] || [[word:sachachakaoro|sachachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
